para_trans: G. Kolhapur is a state protected monument.
Department of Tourism and Cultural Affairs
Government Decision No: RASANSMA-2023 / Q.No.311 / E-687364 / SC-3
Kalanandigarh Fort, Ta. Chandgad, District Kolhapur declared as a State Protected Monument
Manager, Government Interim as the due process has been completed
The Press, Charni Road, Mumbai is under the direction of the Government of India.
The accompanying final notification is in English in the Government of Maharashtra Public Gazette, Part-IV.
30 copy secretaries of the final notification issued by the Department of Cultural Affairs, Ministry of Culture, Mumbai and
Director, Directorate of Archaeological Museums, Maharashtra State, Mumbai.
02. The Director, Directorate of Archaeological Museums shall make arrangements to place a copy of the final notification at the nearest place of the monument.
This Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra's www.maharashtra.gov.inय website.
